composing-basic.gap: client and server still split composition ownership

cursor-editing.gap: server semantic cursor and UTF-16 adapter are not implemented

partial-commit.gap: snapshot effect and remaining-composition authority are absent

secure-input.gap: secure policy exists but is not pinned in a server composition epoch

server-failure.gap: request idempotency and checkpoint replay are absent

stale-candidate.gap: candidate generation and revision are absent

unicode-caret.gap: semantic caret to TSF UTF-16 conversion is not centralized
